lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again!

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! Why? What do I know? I'm just an old man; what would anyone want with an old man?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm lost... Can you help me?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! Who says I'm not lost, eh? Ever think of that, did you?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: In a rush to find out all the answers, not thinking for a second that someone else might be just as lost, if not more lost, than you! And what do you care about them, huh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know about the Myreque?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! Why should I know about the Myreque, eh? What use have they ever been to me, huh? I ask you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you help me?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! What makes you think that I can help you, eh? Do I look like a fountain of knowledge, eh? Do I?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you've helped me before! You said something about symbols? To find the Myreque!

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! Yes of course, that's how to get to them. Follow the symbols.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which symbols?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: The symbol of the Myreque - the silver sickle!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, and where would that be then?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Around and about; it should be an aid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again!

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know about the Myreque?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! Why should I know about the Myreque, eh? What use have they ever been to me, huh? I ask you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But they live right under your house?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! Suppose they do. Stupid Myreque...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you help me?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! What makes you think that I can help you, eh? Do I look like a fountain of knowledge, eh? Do I?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you've helped me before! You helped me find the Myreque!

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! Yes of course, follow the symbols and all that. Pointless now though, they're right below us. Hmph!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again!

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know about the Myreque?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! Dead! That's what I know about the Myreque. You're lucky to not be dead as well. Don't talk about them any more!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you help me?

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! What makes you think that I can help you, eh? Do I look like a fountain of knowledge, eh? Do I?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you've helped me before! You helped me find the Myreque!

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph! Yes of course, follow the symbols and all that. Pointless now though, they're all dead! Hmph!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again!

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Ah! vampyre!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's okay. It's just me.

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Hmph!

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Please make yourself some space, I have something for you.

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: That doesn't look solved to me.

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Well done [Player name]. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Old Man Ral
lines.text: Here, solve this.
